linkedin_profile.headline: Global Marketing and PR Director @Starhotels | Forbes Top 100 CMO Italia | Brand Builder | Entrepreneur | Investor | D&I Advocate | Made in Italy Ambassador
linkedin_profile.about: Over the last 15 years, my career has been an incredible journey learning about luxury hospitality, retail, consumer goods, and most importantly people. The differentiating factors for a company are people and innovation. The world is moving fast and great companies have people who challenge convention and lead change. I aim to create an impact, building strategies that break the mold and meet the evolving needs of clients and the global market. I’m a firm believer in the power of motivation, mental well-being, and empathy, I bring a human-centered perspective to my professional endeavors. My passion for creating meaningful experiences and products extends into my interests—whether skiing down mountains, diving, exploring art, or immersing myself in new cultures. Connecting people, brands, and ideas is at the heart of what I do. 🎯 What sets me apart as a CMO? • Versatility & Adaptability : I quickly grasp the unique dynamics in each industry, connecting the dots and bringing fresh perspectives that balance local insights with global strategies. • Impactful Innovation: I’m committed to disruptive innovation with a measurable focus, driving significant ROI and expanding customer bases. • Entrepreneurial and Collaborative Leadership: I read between the line and usually I anticipate market trends and needs, launching initiatives that elevate brands beyond expectations. I also foster an inclusive work environment that champions creativity and team growth. Work ethic is key to me. Ready to connect with like-minded innovators, collaborators, and visionaries who share the commitment to elevate customer experiences and shape the future.

linkedin_profile.headline: Area Revenue Manager | Master in Tourism Economics and Management | Certificate in Hotel Revenue Management
linkedin_profile.about: As a Revenue Manager in the tourism sector, my expertise lies in driving revenue growth and optimising pricing strategies for hotels and resorts. With different years in the industry, I have developed a keen understanding of market trends, consumer behaviour, and revenue management techniques that allowed me to consistently achieve revenue targets and increase profitability. Throughout my career, I have honed my skills in analysing data, forecasting demand, and implementing pricing strategies. My ability to effectively communicate with cross functional teams and collaborate with various departments has also been instrumental in my success. My main purposes are social, professional knowledge and training; improve work performance taking into account dynamic realties full of never-ending growth; gain new experiences to attain a higher job role.
